tasks.title: Add config.debugger.js loader with React context and hook

reviews.comment: Approved. All CHECKLIST items met; lint + build clean; loader Node smoke test covered missing file, valid ESM, malformed style, bad primaryColor type, empty object. Public API surface is tight; ResolvedDebuggerConfig is a nice stronger return type; provider/context file split is the right call for react-refresh. Non-blocking polish noted for follow-up: (1) remove dead re-export of DEFAULT_DEBUGGER_CONFIG from loadDebuggerConfig.ts:110, (2) drop redundant process?.cwd optional chaining at loadDebuggerConfig.ts:53, (3) consider throwing a clear error instead of falling back to cwd='.' in non-Node contexts, (4) decide whether unknown config keys should warn or be silently ignored before locking schema. Manual pnpm dev visual check still recommended before merge.

Approved by human reviewer. Visual verification at http://localhost:4242 confirmed end-to-end: config.debugger.js at root sets the active tab color via the provider/hook, and the Config tab echoes the same value through useDebuggerConfig(). Polish items from AI review may be deferred to a follow-up.

pushes.commitMessage: docs(N00): add task spec for config.debugger.js loader
feat(N00): load config.debugger.js via React context and hook
chore(N00): record AI review (approved)
chore(N00): wire dev preview to load config.debugger.js
chore(N00): record human review (approved)

tasks.title: Add draggable FAB entrypoint with config-driven position and localStorage persistence

reviews.comment: Approved. All CHECKLIST items met, both follow-up change requests (button.size with default 50px; snap-to-corner animation) integrated cleanly. Gates pass: lint clean, build succeeds, 14 loader smoke-test cases pass (5 button + 7 size + 2 baseline). Snap animation uses correct two-phase (pre/animating) state machine to bootstrap CSS transitions from an arbitrary start position. Non-blocking findings for a follow-up: (1) nearestCorner uses cursor position instead of FAB center as the spec specified (off by <= size/2 px); (2) no onPointerCancel handler — drag could get stuck if a system gesture cancels the pointer; (3) setCorner in useFabPosition isn't memoized (minor re-renders); (4) leftover dead re-export of DEFAULT_DEBUGGER_CONFIG from loadDebuggerConfig.ts (pre-existing from N00); (5) configured prop changes don't reactively update useFabPosition state. None of these affect functional correctness. Manual browser verification recommended before merge.

Round 2 review — fixes verified. All five non-blocking items applied correctly with no regressions: (1) nearestCorner uses FAB center (releaseX/Y + size/2); (2) onPointerCancel handler mirrors pointerup minus snap; (3) useFabPosition derives corner from configured + userChosen with stable useCallback identity — handles all relevant scenarios (draggable toggles, configured changes, user override precedence); (4) dead DEFAULT_DEBUGGER_CONFIG re-export removed, constant still importable from package entry via defaults barrel; (5) checklist boxes all flipped. Gates clean. One minor exotic gap remaining (not flagged for follow-up): draggable=false→true at runtime won't re-read storage. Approved.

Approved by human reviewer. Manual verification covered desktop dev preview and mobile (LAN access via http://192.168.0.77:4242). FAB drag, snap animation, localStorage persistence, and size/draggable config knobs all work as specified. Ready to merge.

changesAfterImplementation.description: Increase default FAB size from 40px to 50px and make it configurable: add button.size (number, px) to DebuggerButtonConfig. Validate as a finite positive number; default 50. Reject 0, negative, non-finite, and non-number values with a [debugger-pro-plus-3000]-prefixed error.
changesAfterImplementation.comment: Added button.size to DebuggerButtonConfig; default 50px (was hard-coded 40px). Loader validates as a finite positive number.

changesAfterImplementation.description: Two changes: (1) Update the demo config.debugger.js to exercise the new button namespace: { draggable: true, size: 51 }. (2) Animate the FAB's position change after the user releases it mid-page: instead of teleporting to the snapped corner, transition smoothly from the release point to the corner's resting coordinates.
changesAfterImplementation.comment: Updated demo config.debugger.js to set button.draggable=true, button.size=51. Added snap-animation state machine to DebuggerFab: drop point -> snapped corner over 220ms via cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1) easing on left/top transitions. State has two phases (pre/animating) so React lays out the FAB at the release point first, then transitions to the corner on the next frame. After the animation completes, the FAB reverts to corner-inset positioning so window resizes don't drift it.

changesAfterImplementation.description: Address five non-blocking findings from the AI review: (1) nearestCorner — use FAB center, not cursor position, when picking the snap corner; (2) onPointerCancel — release pointer capture and clear drag state on cancellation so the FAB never gets stuck mid-drag; (3) useFabPosition — memoize setCorner with useCallback and derive corner reactively from configured + a userChosen state, so configured prop changes update the displayed corner; (4) remove dead DEFAULT_DEBUGGER_CONFIG re-export from loadDebuggerConfig.ts (pre-existing from N00); (5) flip the N01 CHECKLIST items to checked.
changesAfterImplementation.comment: Applied all five non-blocking review items. (1) nearestCorner now feeds FAB-center coords instead of cursor coords. (2) onPointerCancel mirrors pointerup cleanup minus the snap so the FAB never gets stuck. (3) useFabPosition memoizes setCorner via useCallback and derives corner from configured + a separate userChosen state so configured prop changes flow through. (4) Removed the dead DEFAULT_DEBUGGER_CONFIG re-export from loadDebuggerConfig.ts (the type is still publicly available via the defaults barrel). (5) Flipped the N01 CHECKLIST boxes to checked. Gates clean; loader smoke test confirms DEFAULT_DEBUGGER_CONFIG remains importable from the package entry.

pushes.commitMessage: docs(N01): add task spec for draggable FAB entrypoint
docs(N01): finalize decisions (fix localStorage key typo, confirm position prop removal)
feat(N01): draggable FAB entrypoint with config and localStorage
feat(N01): make FAB size configurable via button.size (default 50)
feat(N01): animate FAB snap-to-corner after drag release
chore(N01): record AI review (approved)
refactor(N01): apply non-blocking review fixes
chore(N01): record AI review round 2 (approved)
chore(N01): record human review (approved)

tasks.title: Add full-height debug panel wrapper with configurable title, width, and fullscreen toggle

reviews.comment: Header icon buttons (fullscreen, close) feel too small. The 24x24 hit area is fine, but the icon glyphs at fontSize 14 look cramped. Bump the icon font size and grow the hit area if needed; apply consistent treatment to tab buttons. All other panel behavior verified working.

AI review concurs with human verdict on header icon size, and adds five more sizing/UI items to bundle into the same fix: (1) iconButtonStyle.fontSize 14 -> 18 with hit area grown to 28-32, (2) panelStyle over-constrains box with top+bottom+height, drop bottom:0, (3) tab buttons need inline-flex centering so label sits in middle of minHeight:24 box, (4) titleStyle needs minWidth:0/flex:1 so long titles ellipsize instead of pushing header actions off, (5) DRY: useEffect inlines close logic instead of calling closePanel — memoize with useCallback, (6) aria-label falls back to 'Debugger panel' when panel.title is empty. All checklist items met functionally; these are UI polish + sizing issues. Gates clean. See REVIEW.md for details.

fix.comment: Applied all six bundled findings from AI + human reviews. (1) Header icons: glyph font 14->18, hit area 24->32, plus brighter color (#aaa -> #d8d8d8). Header minHeight 44->48 to accommodate the larger chips. (2) panelStyle no longer over-constrains: kept top:0 + height:100dvh, dropped bottom:0. (3) Tab buttons now inline-flex centered with brighter inactive color and font bumped 11->12 to read more comfortably; tab hit target = 28. (4) Title gets minWidth:0 + flex:1 so long titles ellipsize without pushing header actions off the right edge. (5) closePanel memoized with useCallback([]) and called from both the close button and the Escape handler. (6) aria-label falls back to 'Debugger panel' when panel.title is empty. Gates clean: lint, build.

reviews.comment: Approved after fix round. All six bundled items (icon size, panelStyle, tab centering, title overflow, closePanel memoization, aria-label fallback) verified working on desktop and mobile. Ready to merge.

pushes.commitMessage: docs(N02): add task spec for full-height panel wrapper
feat(N02): full-height panel wrapper with title, width, fullscreen
chore(N02): record human review (fix-needed: header icons too small)
chore(N02): record AI review (fix-needed, bundled findings)
refactor(N02): bump icon sizes and apply bundled review fixes
chore(N02): record human review round 2 (approved)
